entities.name: SOIL PH
entities.description: The acidity or alkalinity of the soil, measured as a pH value.

entities.name: ANGUL
entities.description: A district in Odisha State, India, used as a case study area.

entities.name: BALANGIR
entities.description: A district in Odisha State, India, used as a case study area.

entities.name: ODISHA
entities.description: A state in India where the research was conducted.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the research was conducted.

entities.name: GOOGLE EARTH ENGINE
entities.description: An open-source platform used for remote sensing and estimating soil characteristics.

entities.name: REMOTE SENSING
entities.description: The process of estimating soil characteristics from a distance using satellite data.

entities.name: SENTINEL 1
entities.description: A satellite mission providing data used to generate indices for soil pH estimation.

entities.name: SENTINEL 2
entities.description: A satellite mission providing data used to generate indices for soil pH estimation.

entities.name: LANDSAT
entities.description: A satellite mission providing data used to generate indices for soil pH estimation.

entities.name: STEP-WISE MULTIPLE REGRESSION
entities.description: A statistical model used to develop predictive models for soil pH.

entities.name: ARTIFICIAL NEURAL NETWORKS
entities.description: A predictive model used to estimate soil pH.

entities.name: RANDOM FOREST REGRESSION
entities.description: A predictive model used to estimate soil pH.

entities.name: CLASS-WISE RANDOM FOREST
entities.description: An integrated predictive model combining RF-Acidic, RF-Alkaline, and RF-Neutral models for soil pH.

entities.name: B2
entities.description: A spectral band from Sentinel 2 data correlated with soil pH.

entities.name: B11
entities.description: A spectral band from Sentinel 2 data correlated with soil pH.

entities.name: BRIGHTNESS INDEX
entities.description: A spectral index from Sentinel 2 data correlated with soil pH.

entities.name: SALINITY INDEX 2
entities.description: A spectral index from Sentinel 2 data correlated with soil pH.

entities.name: SALINITY INDEX 5
entities.description: A spectral index from Sentinel 2 data correlated with soil pH.

entities.name: VH/VV INDEX
entities.description: A spectral index from Sentinel 1 data correlated with soil pH.

entities.name: TIR1
entities.description: A thermal infrared band from Landsat data correlated with soil pH.

entities.name: ACIDIC SOILS
entities.description: Soils characterized by low pH levels.

entities.name: NEUTRAL SOILS
entities.description: Soils characterized by neutral pH levels.

entities.name: ALKALINE SOILS
entities.description: Soils characterized by high pH levels.

entities.name: BIG DATA ANALYTICS
entities.description: The use of large datasets to predict soil pH and map soils.
